$schema: Monkey Archipelago — Lesson JSON Schema v2.0
description: Root lesson object may be at top level or under "lesson"

story.act1: The Blue Island glows at sunset; coconut paths wind toward an ancient cave door covered in glowing shells.
story.act2: The Crab Monkey mixed up every counting shell — now the gate will not open until the number patterns are restored!
story.act3: Alex, only you can read the secret rhythm of the shells and open the way for the monkeys.
story.goal: Today you practice seeing what comes next in a pattern and why the rule works.

stages.mechanic_reason: Age 7 medium: start with hands-on drag — lowest cognitive load before symbols.
stages.title: Gather the shells
stages.instruction: Drag shells into the baskets as shown.

stages.mechanic_reason: Medium: bridge from objects to number sequences at cave entrance.
stages.title: Next number at the gate
stages.instruction: Type the missing number in the pattern.

stages.mechanic_reason: Medium: quick check of rule understanding inside the cave.
stages.title: Which rule fits?
stages.question: What comes next: 2, 5, 8, ?

stages.mechanic_reason: Medium: ordering reinforces sequence comparison skills.
stages.title: Smallest to largest
stages.instruction: Place values in order in the slots.

stages.mechanic_reason: Medium: one focused input before finale.
stages.title: One missing step

stages.mechanic_reason: Finale: celebrate and award artifact; optional short sequence before reward.
stages.title: The compass awakens

artifact.name: Mind-reading glasses
artifact.description: Lets you hear what numbers are thinking so patterns cannot hide.
artifact.dalle_prompt: Magical reading glasses with glowing purple crystal lenses, soft sparkles, mind-reading aura, magical glowing artifact, Pixar 3D style, warm golden light, floating in air, transparent background, WEBP. No text.

generate_with_dalle.prompt: Single blue sea shell game icon, isolated, transparent background, no text.

Magical reading glasses with glowing purple crystal lenses, soft sparkles, mind-reading aura, magical glowing artifact, Pixar 3D style, warm golden light, floating in air, transparent background, WEBP. No text.

tutor_notes.block1_script: Open with the story acts, then let the child predict before each task.
tutor_notes.block2_hint: If stuck, compare two neighbors in the list and say what changed.
block3_tips: Praise the rule explanation, not only the final number.
Use fingers for small steps if needed.
tutor_notes.block5_abstraction: Patterns are just rules you can say in words: 'add 3 each time' or 'double then add 1'.
tutor_notes.weak_point_focus: Hidden steps and 'find the wrong number' tasks.
